content.en:
If you want to create the Space Ancestor Method, the difficulty is naturally much higher than that of creating other Ancestor Methods.

But Ye Tian still has enough time at present, so he doesn't worry about not having enough time.

Anyway, his doppelganger, the Aoba Ancestor, had grown enough to resist the destruction of the Ancestor, so he didn't have to worry about safety.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian wholeheartedly created the Space Ancestor Method.

A realm year!

Two Realms Year!

Three Realms Year!

......

Before I knew it, the thirteen realms had passed.

On this day, Ye Tian finally created the Space Ancestor Method.

Moreover, the Spatial Ancestor Method he created was much better than the Spatial Ancestor Method obtained from the Void Ancestor.

If he became an Ancestor with his Spatial Ancestor Method, he could definitely become a powerful Spatial Ancestor.

"There is still time left for the Ancestor Law, continue to create!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It took Ye Tian thirteen realm years to create the Space Ancestor Method, and the Time Ancestor Method was more terrifying than the Space Ancestor Method, so it was more difficult.

This time, it took Ye Tian a full eighteen realm years to finally create the Time Ancestor Method.

At this point, the Foundation Ancestor Method has been created.

Next, Ye Tian needed to use these basic ancestor methods to fuse into the Endless Ancestor Method.

This step is also difficult, I am afraid that it will take a long time, but at least there is a clear direction, so that it will not fall into the bottleneck shackles and cannot be broken.

"Before retreating, you need to teach these ancestral methods to Yue'er and Xingchen!"

Ye Tian thought.

His wife, son, daughter, and sister were all already at the peak of the Superior Domain Ancestor, and their cultivation was already unprogressable, and only by cultivating the ancestral skills and refining the ancestral body could they continue to progress.

And they also need to fuse the Ancestor Law to break through to the Ancestor Realm, with their own understanding and talent, it is not hopeless to want to create the Ancestor Law themselves, but the hope is not very great, even if they can really create it, it will take endless long years.

Instead of this, it is better to fuse his Ancestor Method, and there is still hope to grow to the elite Ancestor realm in the future.

So, Ye Tiancai wanted to teach them these ancestral methods.

"Yue'er, Xingchen, Xingyue, Xiaoyu, you guys come here!"

Ye Tian's divine sense transmitted to them.

Whoa!!

Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu tore through the space one after another and came to Ye Tian.

"Husband!"

"Father!"

"Brother!"

The four shouted one by one.

Ye Tian looked at the four of them and said, "I have created some Ancestor Methods, all of which are the top Ancestor Methods, and I want to consult your opinions." Do you still choose to merge my Ancestor Method to become an Ancestor, or do you choose to create your own Ancestor Method?"

"Some ancestral laws?"

The four of them widened their eyes and showed an incredulous look.

How precious the Ancestor Law is, I don't know how many demonic geniuses in the Dark Forbidden Domain can't create the Ancestor Law by themselves, and they can't even obtain a complete and ownerless Ancestor Law, so they can't be promoted to the Ancestor in their lifetime.

Even some of the broken Ancestor Methods have become treasures snatched by many Superior Peak Ancestors, and they all want to use that Broken Ancestor Method to become half-step Ancestors.

And the complete Ancestor Law can't even be created by the Ancestors, so if there is a complete Ownerless Ancestor Method, even the Ancestors will have to snatch and fight to get a chance for their descendants to become the Ancestors.

There are too few Ancestors of the Dark Forbidden Realm, just because the Ancestor Law is too rare and too difficult to create.

But now, Ye Tian said that he had created some ancestral methods, obviously more than one.

If this sentence spread, it would definitely cause a big shock in the entire Dark Forbidden Domain, and all the ancestors would have to stare at Ye Tian.

"Husband, I choose to fuse the Ancestral Law you created!"

Xiao Yue chosen.

She didn't have confidence in herself, and the other Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors couldn't create the Ancestor Method, and the Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor that she had been growing up with Ye Tian had the potential to create an Ancestor Method of her own!

Therefore, it is very good to be able to obtain an ancestral method that suits you, and you can't force anything else.

"Okay, these ancestral methods, you choose a fusion, the ancestral method is very domineering, as long as you can successfully fuse, it will forcibly reverse the path of your cultivation, so it doesn't depend on whether it is suitable for you, and the impact is not very great. Of course, naturally there is no Ancestor Fa that is absolutely suitable for you!"

Ye Tian said.

Whoa!!!

The Ancestor Law Inheritance of One Gate appeared in front of Xiao Yue.

Xiao Yue looked at these Ancestor Methods, and finally made a decision: "Husband, I choose the Ancestor Method of Light!"

"Okay, this Ancestor Law of Light will be given to you by Yue'er!"

Ye Tian integrated the Ancestor of Light method into Xiao Yue's soul, once Xiao Yue fused the Ancestor of Light Method, even if others obtained this Ancestor of Light method in the future, they would not be able to achieve the ancestor, and they could only borrow the Ancestor of Light method to comprehend the light system holy technique and ancestral technique.

Ye Yu, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue also chose to fuse the Ancestral Law and not create it.

They also feel that there is little hope for their own creation, so they don't waste their time.

Besides, where did they dare to imagine becoming an ancestor before, they were satisfied to be able to become a peerless domain ancestor, so they didn't ask too much.

"It's your turn, Xiaoyu!"

Ye Tian asked Ye Yu to choose the second.

As for the two juniors, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, they are naturally the third and fourth choices, and the two of them have absolutely no opinion.

Ye Yu did not hesitate to choose the Ice Ancestor Method: "Brother, I choose the Ice Ancestor Method!"

Ye Tian nodded, integrating the Ice Ancestor Method into Ye Yu's soul.

Then, it was Ye Xingchen's turn.

Ye Xingchen pondered for a while, and finally chose the extremely powerful Space Ancestor Method.

In this way, after he becomes an ancestor, his strength will be stronger than that of ordinary ancestors.

And Ye Xingyue was not to be outdone, and chose the Time Ancestor Method, which happened to be at the same level as her brother Ye Xingchen, and the time and space were opposite, and they were brother and sister, which was extremely suitable.

Of course.

If they want to fully comprehend the Time Ancestor Method and the Space Ancestor Law, it will take a long time, but one day they will be able to comprehend it thoroughly, so that they can become an Ancestor.

Ye Tian's family has chosen the Ancestor Method, as for the other Ancestor Methods, he will not give them to others for the time being, unless someone can really meet his requirements, he will give these Ancestor Methods.

"It's time to continue the retreat, merge these Ancestral Methods, and create my own Endless Ancestral Method!"

Ye Tian entered the cultivation room and continued to retreat and create.
